heading: Employee drug and alcohol abuse assistance programs
label: 566 Employee drug and alcohol abuse assistance programs

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: The Secretary of Labor shall establish a program through which the Secretary shall provide grants to, or enter into contracts with, employers to enable such employers to develop employee drug and alcohol abuse assistance programs.

children.heading: Applications
children.label: b Applications
children.text: Employers desiring to receive a grant or contract under this section shall submit to the Secretary of Labor, an application, in such form and containing such information as the Secretary may require.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: c Regulations
children.text: The Secretary of Labor shall promulgate regulations necessary to carry out this section.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section, $4,000,000 for fiscal year 1989, and $5,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 1990 and 1991.
